article.title: UBER Interview confusion
article.content:
Got ths mail from Uber , I got my interview scheduled in a few days. can anyone tell me what is the topic cause i did not have any rounds yet this is my first round . 
But usually the topic of the First round is Data structure and algorithm . and the Interview name is BPS. but this time it is written coding + Design & architectur, and also The interviewer name is mentioned , earlier this used to be mentioned only for loop rounds .

added image for reference ( edited the names and the interview dates and hackerrank link for secrecy reasons )
interviewer replies really late which is why asking here 
![91860.jpg](https://assets.leetcode.com/users/images/99db25ae-0363-4c83-af54-ce6e10138e04_1776742916.7828486.jpeg)

post.content:
you can/must ask your recruiter on more details

based on my experience this is not a DSA round ( I can be wrong though lol ) ... 

it will be some coding round from your domain i.e. Frontend ... you will have to write working code for some problem and  also give some thought to how you are writing that code ( but focus more on correct working solution ) .... also it is not OA I think, it will be a human interaction where someone will talk with you, while you work on the problem, where you should share what you are thinking and doing. 

most likely for SDE 2 role, there will be no architecture level discussions AFAIK ( but clarify with recruiter), it will just be a coding problem .. 

you can search for questions asked in this round on Google, the questions are not SUPER hard but I have heard that people get rejected if they don't write correctly working code even if they explained the ideas correctly, so selection criteria here might be strict.


best wishes for the round.
